---
title: "Stack"
description: >-
  Computational biology and software engineering: omics analysis, sequencing
  technologies, programming, machine learning, databases and infrastructure.
toc: true
---

::: {.lead .reveal}
The tools I work with, and the methods I use them for.
:::

## Computational biology

::: {.stack-grid}

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-dna"></i></span>

#### Omics analysis
- Genomics
- Transcriptomics
- RNA biology (isoforms, polyadenylation, APA sites, modifications, splicing)
- Phylogenetic analyses
- Variant calling
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-activity"></i></span>

#### Sequencing technologies
- Illumina
- Oxford Nanopore
- PacBio
:::

:::

## Software engineering & DevOps

::: {.stack-grid}

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-braces"></i></span>

#### Programming
- R (tidyverse, data.table, Bioconductor)
- Python (pandas, SciPy, scikit-learn, Keras, TensorFlow/PyTorch)
- Bash
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i></span>

#### Machine learning
- Predictive modelling
- Deep learning
- Model development, validation & deployment for biology
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-bar-chart"></i></span>

#### Data visualisation & reporting
- Interactive dashboards & graphics
- ggplot2, shiny, plotly, rmarkdown, streamlit
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-box-seam"></i></span>

#### Software development
Creator of and contributor to openly available bioinformatic tools:

- [ninetails](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/ninetails)
- [nanotail2](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB)
- [NanoQuRe](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/NanoQuRe)
- [rDNAmine](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/rDNA_mine)
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-database"></i></span>

#### Databases
- SQL (MySQL, PostgreSQL)
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-cloud"></i></span>

#### Infrastructure
- Docker
- Kubernetes
- Cloud platforms (Azure)
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-check2-square"></i></span>

#### Best practices
- Version control (Git)
- Reproducible research
:::

:::

::: {.btn-row}
<a class="btn-cta" href="software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> See it applied</a>
<a class="btn-ghost" href="publications/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications</a>
:::
